title: Annual Leave Entitlement and Booking Vacation
text:
Q: What is my annual leave entitlement and how do I book vacation?
A: Employees are entitled to 20 days of annual leave per year, in addition to public holidays. Leave is accrued on a pro-rata basis, meaning if you start or leave partway through the year, your entitlement will be adjusted accordingly. To book your vacation, please submit a leave request through the Employee Portal at least four weeks in advance of your desired leave dates. This allows your manager sufficient time to plan for your absence. Once submitted, your manager will review the request and respond within five business days. If you have any questions or need assistance, please contact the HR department at hr@company.com.
